html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Winter's Feast
Winter Foods are exclusive Food items for the event. They have a 20% chance to be dropped randomly by killed Animals and Monsters. Much like Halloween Candies, they do not perish over time, and restore up to 2 Health, 2 Sanity and 3 Hunger. As an exception, the Eternal Fruitcake will be rejected by any character upon attempting to eat it, making it only useful for feeding other creatures (e.g. Pigs, to obtain Manure). All Winter Foods stack up to 40. Gingerbread Cookies, Sugar Cookies, Candy Canes, Eternal Fruitcakes and Chocolate Log Cakes can also be used to decorate Winter's Feast Trees.

The following Winter Foods are available:

Food Name Temperature Food type Spawn Code
Gingerbread Cookie Yes 0 3 1 Goodies "winter_food1"
Sugar Cookie Yes 0 2 2 Goodies "winter_food2"
Candy Cane Yes 2 0 2 Goodies "winter_food3"
Eternal Fruitcake Yes -2 6 -2 Veggie "winter_food4"
Chocolate Log Cake Yes 1 2 1 Goodies "winter_food5"
Plum Pudding No 0 4 0 Veggie "winter_food6"
Apple Cider No 2 0 1 +15 Veggie "winter_food7"
Hot Cocoa No 1 0 2 +15 Goodies "winter_food8"
Heavenly Eggnog No 0 3 0 -15 Meats "winter_food9"

Contents

  • 1 Gingerbread Cookie
  • 2 Sugar Cookie
  • 3 Candy Cane
  • 4 Eternal Fruitcake
  • 5 Chocolate Log Cake
  • 6 Plum Pudding
  • 7 Apple Cider
  • 8 Hot Cocoa
  • 9 Heavenly Eggnog
  • 10 Trivia
  • 11 Gallery

Gingerbread Cookie

The Gingerbread Cookie can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration.

Sugar Cookie

The Sugar Cookie can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration.

Candy Cane

The Candy Cane can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration.

Eternal Fruitcake

The Eternal Fruitcake is Veggie item and can be eaten by Pig to get Manure. It can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration. Because the Fruitcake is "eternal", it cannot be incinerated by a Scaled Furnace.[trivia 1] Despite this, it can still be destroyed by feeding it to Pigs, Merms, Critters, or an Eye Mask. Bunnymen, Pigs, and Merms will also eat the Eternal Fruitcake off of the ground.

The Eternal Fruitcake on the ground will not be picked up by The Lazy Forager, Maxwell's Shadow Servant and Polly Roger's Hat.

Chocolate Log Cake

The Chocolate Log Cake can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration.

Plum Pudding

The Plum Pudding is Veggie item and can be eaten by Pig to get Manure.

Apple Cider

The Apple Cider is Veggie item. When drank, it will raise the player's temperature by 15 degrees.

Hot Cocoa

The Hot Cocoa is Goodies item. When drank, it will raise the player's temperature by 15 degrees.

Heavenly Eggnog

The Heavenly Eggnog is a Meat item. Like other Meats, it can be traded with Birds in Birdcage to get Eggs. When drank, it will lower the player's temperature by 15 degrees.

Trivia

  1. ↑ When looking at the code for the Scaled Furnace that prevents the Eternal Fruitcake from being incinerated, a developer comment can be found. It reads as follows: "NOTES(JBK): Fruitcake hack. You think you can escape this so easily?"

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

Food Info

0

"winter_food1"
“The anatomy's not right, but I'll overlook it.”
–Wilson
“Honestly, who DOESN'T eat the head first?”
–Willow
“Little man will crumble under my mighty teeth!”
–Wolfgang
“I'm going to eat you.”
–Wendy
“WHERE ARE THE ROBOT-SHAPED CONFECTIONS”
–WX-78
“What a delightful little individual.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a gingerbread lumberjack.”
–Woodie
“Stop looking at me, cookie fiend.”
–Maxwell
“Höw döst I free you fröm the bread, man öf ginger??”
–Wigfrid
“I won't eat it. It's our friend now.”
–Webber
“It has that "homecooked" charm.”
–Warly
“Friend?”
–Wormwood
“I love these things!”
–Winona
“It looks like a little mortal! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“MMMM, but what it supposed to be?”
–Wurt
“Mom made these every year.”
–Walter
“I half expect it to start running at any moment.”
–Wanda
The Gingerbread Cookie can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration.

“Always had a soft spot for a good holiday cookie.”

“Icy icy icing!”

–Warly
“Oh. Didn't fall from sky”
–Wormwood
“No thanks, I'm sweet enough.”
–Winona
“I might try one today.”
–Wortox
“This snowflake melt on tongue too!”
–Wurt
“I'll make sure the younger kids don't eat too many.”
–Walter
“It's so hard to stop once you've eaten one.”
–Wanda
The Sugar Cookie can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration.

“That thing just ain't right.”

“Yuck! What is that??”

“It grows on you.”

“Just terrible.”
–Winona
“How deliciously evil!”

“Glurgh, what in this?”

“I'm... good.”
–Walter
“"Eternal"? Ha!”
–Wanda
The Eternal Fruitcake is Veggie item and can be eaten by Pig to get Manure. It can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration. Because the Fruitcake is "eternal", it cannot be incinerated by a Scaled Furnace.[trivia 1] Despite this, it can still be destroyed by feeding it to Pigs, Merms, Critters, or an Eye Mask. Bunnymen, Pigs, and Merms will also eat the Eternal Fruitcake off of the ground.
The Eternal Fruitcake on the ground will not be picked up by The Lazy Forager, Maxwell's Shadow Servant and Polly Roger's Hat.

"winter_food5"
“It's nice to eat something other than berries for once.”
–Wilson
“A log for eating, not for burning.”
–Willow
“Ha! Is not real log, Wolfgang was not fooled!”
–Wolfgang
“It tastes okay, but I've grown tired of logs...”
–Wendy
“THE ORGANICS SHAPED THIS ONE LIKE A LOG”
–WX-78
“Such expertly prepared raspberry filling!”
–Wickerbottom
“All the taste and none of the splinters!”
–Woodie
“How, err... traditional.”
–Maxwell
“We feast tönight!”
–Wigfrid
“Haha, Wendy! Watch our Woodie impression!”
–Webber
“I wouldn't turn down a slice.”
–Warly
“Friend?!... Oh. Nope”
–Wormwood
“Chocolatey.”
–Winona
“Mortal food shaped like a log! How silly.”
–Wortox
“It not a real log?”
–Wurt
“It's soooo good!”
–Walter
“I never understood the appeal of making a dessert that looks like a piece of wood.”
–Wanda
The Chocolate Log Cake can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration.

“Not my favorite thing.”

“It's really, really good!”

“I'm so happy I could weep.”

“Makes belly full”

“I know what eggs are, but what's a "nog"?”
–Winona
“I might try this mortal treat.”

“Sluuuurrrrp!”
–Wurt
“It's so sweet!”
–Walter
“A nice cold glass of eggnog might do me some good.”
–Wanda
The Heavenly Eggnog is a Meat item. Like other Meats, it can be traded with Birds in Birdcage to get Eggs. When drank, it will lower the player's temperature by 15 degrees.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
↑ When looking at the code for the Scaled Furnace that prevents the Eternal Fruitcake from being incinerated, a developer comment can be found. It reads as follows: "NOTES(JBK): Fruitcake hack. You think you can escape this so easily?"

title: Winter Food
wikitext: {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}{{Event|Winter's Feast}} '''Winter Foods''' are exclusive [[Food]] items for the event. They have a 20% chance to be dropped randomly by killed [[Animals]] and [[Monster]]s. Much like [[Hallowed Nights|Halloween Candies]], they do not perish over time, and restore up to 2 [[Health]], 2 [[Sanity]] and 3 [[Hunger]]. As an exception, the Eternal Fruitcake will be rejected by any character upon attempting to eat it, making it only useful for feeding other creatures (e.g. [[Pig]]s, to obtain [[Manure]]). All Winter Foods stack up to 40. Gingerbread Cookies, Sugar Cookies, Candy Canes, Eternal Fruitcakes and Chocolate Log Cakes can also be used to decorate [[Winter's Feast Tree]]s. Ha! |choose = wanda }} The '''Eternal Fruitcake''' is [[Veggie]] item and can be eaten by [[Pig]] to get [[Manure]]. It can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration. Because the Fruitcake is "eternal", it cannot be incinerated by a [[Scaled Furnace]].When looking at the code for the Scaled Furnace that prevents the Eternal Fruitcake from being incinerated, a developer comment can be found. It reads as follows: ''"NOTES(JBK): Fruitcake hack. You think you can escape this so easily?"'' Despite this, it can still be destroyed by feeding it to [[Pig]]s, [[Merm]]s, [[Critter]]s, or an [[Eye Mask]]. [[Bunnyman/DST|Bunnymen]], Pigs, and Merms will also eat the Eternal Fruitcake off of the ground. The Eternal Fruitcake on the ground will not be picked up by [[The Lazy Forager]], Maxwell's [[Shadow Servant]] and [[Polly Roger's Hat]]. {{Clear}} ==[[File:Chocolate Log Cake.png|32px]]Chocolate Log Cake== {{Object Infobox |name = Chocolate Log Cake |icon = Chocolate Log Cake.png |image = Chocolate Log Cake Dropped.png |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 2 |sanityRestored = 1 |foodType = {{FoodType|Goodies}} |spawnCode = "winter_food5" }} {{Quotes |wilson = It's nice to eat something other than berries for once. |willow = A log for eating, not for burning. |wolfgang = Ha! Is not real log, Wolfgang was not fooled! |wendy = It tastes okay, but I've grown tired of logs... |wx78 = THE ORGANICS SHAPED THIS ONE LIKE A LOG |wickerbottom = Such expertly prepared raspberry filling! |woodie = All the taste and none of the splinters! |maxwell = How, err... traditional. |wigfrid = We feast tönight! |webber = Haha, Wendy! Watch our Woodie impression! |winona = Chocolatey. |warly = I wouldn't turn down a slice. |wortox = Mortal food shaped like a log! How silly. |wormwood = Friend?!... Oh. Nope |wurt = It not a real log? |walter = It's soooo good! |wanda = I never understood the appeal of making a dessert that looks like a piece of wood. |choose = woodie }} The '''Chocolate Log Cake''' can be hung on a Winter's Feast Tree as a decoration. {{Clear}} ==[[File:Plum Pudding.png|32px]]Plum Pudding== {{Object Infobox |name = Plum Pudding |icon = Plum Pudding.png |image = Plum Pudding Dropped.png |hpRestored = 0 |hungerRestored = 4 |sanityRestored = 0 |foodType = {{FoodType|Veggie}} |spawnCode = "winter_food6" }} {{Quotes |wilson = I'm puddin' that straight in my mouth! |willow = I'm gonna totally stuff my face!! |wolfgang = Tiny yummy cakething make strong Wolfgang. |wendy = I'm going to lick all the icing off... |wx78 = I REQUIRE MORE TREATS |wickerbottom = "Plum" is a 17th century term for "fruit", dear. |woodie = Hard to complain about this whole "Feast" business. |maxwell = It's extremely rich. |wigfrid = Twas plucked straight fröm my nightmares! |webber = Where are the plums? |winona = Not my favorite thing. |warly = Just like maman used to make. |wortox = Hyuyu! The mortals liquefied these plums! |wormwood = Ball goes in belly |wurt = Watch! Can put whole thing in mouth! |walter = There's fruit in it, so it's healthy right? |wanda = Alright, maybe just a bit of pudding. |choose = wickerbottom }} The '''Plum Pudding''' is [[Veggie]] item and can be eaten by [[Pig]] to get [[Manure]]. {{Clear}} ==[[File:Apple Cider.png|32px]]Apple Cider== {{Object Infobox |name = Apple Cider |icon = Apple Cider.png |image = Apple Cider Dropped.png |hpRestored = 2 |hungerRestored = 0 |sanityRestored = 1 |foodType = {{FoodType|Veggie}} |perk = Raises temperature by 15 degrees. |spawnCode = "winter_food7" }} {{Quotes |wilson = It's a hollowed apple filled with yummy juice. |willow = Sure beats rainwater! |wolfgang = Little fruit is sweet and tasty! |wendy = I don't want Winter's Feast to end... |wx78 = DELICIOUS OBLITERATED APPLES |wickerbottom = Pair it with a good book and you've a cure for the winter blues. |woodie = Doesn't fall far from the cider tree. |maxwell = Glorified apple juice. |wigfrid = Sömething sö föul shall never pass my lips! |webber = Apple juice?! Yes!! |winona = That's the good stuff. |warly = Just the right amount of sweetness. |wortox = I believe I can stomach liquids. |wormwood = Haha! Friend made a drink! |wurt = Mmmmm... |walter = Mmm, so warm and cinnamon-y! |wanda = Something warm to sip on. |choose = wx78 }} The '''Apple Cider''' is [[Veggie]] item. When drank, it will raise the player's temperature by 15 degrees. {{Clear}} ==[[File:Hot Cocoa.png|32px]]Hot Cocoa== {{Object Infobox |name = Hot Cocoa |icon = Hot Cocoa.png |image = Hot Cocoa Dropped.png |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 0 |sanityRestored = 2 |foodType = {{FoodType|Goodies}} |perk = Raises temperature by 15 degrees. |spawnCode = "winter_food8" }} {{Quotes |wilson = How does it stay warm? A thermodynamical mug? |willow = I only like it when it's SCALDING. |wolfgang = Wolfgang likes feeling cozy. |wendy = I missed cocoa. |wx78 = ARE MY INSIDES LIQUID PROOF |wickerbottom = A small enchantment keeps it a pleasant temperature. |woodie = Perfect for drinking next to a good fire, eh? |maxwell = Such a decadent beverage. |wigfrid = Warms the söul. |webber = It makes our claws and tummy so warm. |winona = Don't burn your mouth. |warly = It smells like comfort and contentment. |wortox = Maybe just a sip. |wormwood = Mmm... When drank, it will raise the player's temperature by 15 degrees. {{Clear}} ==[[File:Heavenly Eggnog.png|32px]]Heavenly Eggnog== {{Object Infobox |name = Heavenly Eggnog |icon = Heavenly Eggnog.png |image = Heavenly Eggnog Dropped.png |hpRestored = 0 |hungerRestored = 3 |sanityRestored = 0 |foodType = {{FoodType|Meat}} |perk = Lower temperature by 15 degrees. |spawnCode = "winter_food9" }} {{Quotes |wilson = Can science explain why it tastes so good? |willow = Who knew stuff from a bird's butt could be so tasty? |wolfgang = Is much protein inside, yes? |wendy = So aggressively delicious. You can't help but feel better. |wx78 = EGG JUICE TO POUR DOWN YOUR FOOD HATCH |wickerbottom = I've always harbored a weakness for good 'nog. |woodie = Psst, Lucy. Do I have a 'nog moustache? |maxwell = My... favorite... she remembered. |wigfrid = Imbibable eggs! |webber = It's really, really good! |winona = I know what eggs are, but what's a "nog"? |warly = I'm so happy I could weep. |wortox = I might try this mortal treat. |wormwood = Makes belly full |wurt = Sluuuurrrrp! |walter = It's so sweet! |wanda = A nice cold glass of eggnog might do me some good. |choose = maxwell }} The '''Heavenly Eggnog''' is a [[Food_Type#Meat|Meat]] item. Like other Meats, it can be traded with [[Birds]] in [[Birdcage]] to get [[Egg]]s.
